subject: [PATCH 7/8] mm: use zone lock guard in free_pcppages_bulk()

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: The patch introduces a zone lock guard in free_pcppages_bulk() to replace the explicit lock/unlock pattern with automatic scope-based cleanup, improving code readability and reducing the risk of deadlocks.

2026-03-09.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve the locking mechanism in the mm module by introducing a zone lock guard in free_pcppages_bulk(). The current explicit lock/unlock pattern is replaced with automatic scope-based cleanup, reducing the risk of deadlocks and improving code readability.
